"'''Deep Forest'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] featured in ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]'', written and drawn by [[Sang Jun Lee]].

==Publisher's summary==
''"''A Wookiee hunting expedition in the forests of Kashyyyk becomes something far larger than expected when a young warrior uncovers the pending Separatist invasion.''"<ref name="Inside Star Wars: Visionaries" />''

==Plot summary==
A [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] hunting expedition in the jungles of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] becomes something far more dangerous than expected when a young warrior discovers a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] invasion force.
